category_sources: Official GitHub README describes progress as a tool that monitors coreutils commands such as cp, mv, dd, tar, gzip, and cat.
source_facts.description identifies progress as a Coreutils progress viewer.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading styles the project as progress.
source_facts.name provides the command name progress.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides installation, build, usage, and examples for progress.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/Xfennec/progress, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes monitoring running coreutils commands and displaying percentage, ETA, throughput, and top-like mode.
source_facts.description identifies Coreutils progress viewer functionality.
